recent.statement: A major flood will hit Austria within the next week, affecting at least 10,000 people.
recent.evidence: No signal reports a major flood in Austria affecting at least 10,000 people during the window, and such an event would have been captured.

recent.statement: WTI Crude Oil price will rise by 2.5-3.5% within 24 hours due to sustained below-average ship transits in the Strait of Hormuz (15 daily vs 21 30-day average) and backwardation in the 6-month curve indicating physical supply stress
recent.evidence: No signal reports WTI Crude Oil price; the only oil price given is Brent at +6.33%, a different benchmark and outside the specified 2.5-3.5% range.

recent.statement: A tropical cyclone will make landfall in Mexico
recent.evidence: The listed cyclones (BERTHA near Texas, FAUSTO and ELIDA far offshore in the Pacific, NOUL in the NW Pacific/China) show no landfall in Mexico, all with zero affected population.

recent.statement: A magnitude 6.0 earthquake will occur in the South Of Fiji Islands
recent.evidence: No signal provides evidence of a magnitude 6.0 earthquake occurring in the South Of Fiji Islands during the window.

recent.statement: Texas electricity demand will exceed 100 GWh/h for 3 consecutive days due to heatwave
recent.evidence: The window has closed and no admissible signal contains text showing Texas electricity demand exceeded 100 GWh/h for three consecutive days.

recent.statement: Heavy rainfall will cause flooding in Eastern Europe
recent.evidence: No signal provides text showing that heavy rainfall caused flooding in Eastern Europe within the window.

recent.statement: Texas electricity demand surges to 105 GWh/h due to extreme heat
recent.evidence: No signal text shows Texas electricity demand reaching 105 GWh/h, and the window has closed.

recent.statement: Severe thunderstorms will cause power outages in the Midwest US
recent.evidence: No captured signal concerns this forecast, and a widespread severe thunderstorm power outage event in the Midwest would certainly have been captured within the closed window.

recent.statement: Flash flooding in Albuquerque, New Mexico will disrupt at least 3 major highways
recent.evidence: No signal provides evidence of flash flooding disrupting three major highways in Albuquerque, and such a major event would have been captured within the closed window.

recent.statement: Natural gas futures (NG=F) will rise by 2.5-3.5% following the EIA weekly storage report release on July 23
recent.evidence: No signal reports NG=F price movement following the July 23 EIA storage report; S5 only references a future July 30 report, so the claimed 2.5-3.5% rise is unconfirmed.

recent.statement: The Strait of Hormuz will experience a significant increase in oil tanker traffic.
recent.evidence: Strait of Hormuz showed 15 daily transits, 30% below its 30-day average of 21, indicating a decrease rather than a significant increase in tanker traffic.

recent.statement: Severe thunderstorm in Tampa, Florida disrupts air travel and causes power outages
recent.evidence: No captured signal concerns this forecast, and an event this significant would certainly have been captured if it occurred.

self_calibration.note: Published headline probability is RAW conviction (unchanged); this is the honest companion. Calibration fixes overconfidence, not discrimination — see /calibration.
